tasks.title: Active Latvian lotteries 2026-03-20 (RU site)
tasks.description: Extract active lotteries as of 2026-03-20 from Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls, exclude magazine/newspaper-related entries; produce JSON and Russian static site.

tasks.title: Remove lottery 8830
tasks.description: Remove permit 8830 from the published lottery dataset and enriched metadata so the site no longer shows this lottery.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: remove permit 8830 from both dataset files and verify no remaining references in published assets.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: removing permit 8830 from assets/active_lotteries.json and assets/enriched_info.json; will preserve surrounding user changes and verify no remaining references.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verification note: replaced the raw rg verify command with a shell wrapper that returns success when no 8830 matches remain in assets.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: JSON structure validated for assets/active_lotteries.json and assets/enriched_info.json; no 8830 references remain in published assets.

commit.message: 🗑️ T-002 Remove lottery 8830 from published data

tasks.title: Normalize line endings in site files
tasks.description: Convert the accidental CRLF endings back to LF in index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css without any content changes.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: normalize line endings back to LF in the three modified site files and confirm the diffs disappear.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: normalizing accidental CRLF endings back to LF in index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css without any content changes.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css were normalized back to LF; git diff for those files is now empty, so no standalone implementation commit was necessary.

tasks.title: Configure automatic GitHub sync
tasks.description: Set up this repository so commits are pushed to the private GitHub origin automatically, while ignoring temporary local research files.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: ignore temporary research artifacts, install a post-commit hook for automatic push to origin/main, and verify the remaining blocker is GitHub authentication.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: update .gitignore for temporary research artifacts and install a local post-commit hook that pushes origin/main automatically.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: temporary research files are ignored, the local post-commit hook is executable, HTTPS authentication is configured, and pushes to origin/main succeed automatically after commit creation.

tasks.title: Prepare repo for GitHub Pages
tasks.description: Add the minimal repository files needed so this static site is ready to be published via GitHub Pages from the main branch root.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: add .nojekyll at the repo root so GitHub Pages serves the static site directly from main/root without Jekyll processing.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: add .nojekyll at the repository root so GitHub Pages serves the static site directly from main/root without Jekyll processing.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: .nojekyll exists at the repository root, so the static site is ready to be served by GitHub Pages from main/root once Pages is enabled in the GitHub UI.

tasks.title: Notify on IAUI file updates
tasks.description: Check the IAUI registry page on a schedule and create a GitHub issue when the published lottery registry file metadata changes, without modifying site data.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: add a lightweight IAUI metadata check script and a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow that opens an issue only when the published file metadata changes.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: add a lightweight IAUI metadata check script and a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow that opens an issue only when the published file metadata changes.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: the IAUI metadata check script compiles, the scheduled/manual GitHub Actions workflow exists, and the implementation notifies via GitHub Issues without changing site data or creating content-sync commits.
